steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clause before the blank states that the Comac ARJ21 is far more aerodynamic, signalling that the following clause will give additional support or evidence for that claim.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The logical relationship is addition/emphasis — the passage has already stated the Comac ARJ21 is far more aerodynamic; the blank introduces a specific data point (the lift-to-drag ratio) as concrete evidence reinforcing that claim.
  • Choice A — In fact,: signals that what follows provides confirming evidence or a stronger version of the prior claim, fitting the ratio as proof of greater aerodynamics. ✓
  • Choice B — Nevertheless,: signals that something is true despite an obstacle, implying the ratio somehow contradicts the aerodynamic claim — the opposite of what the passage does. ✗
  • Choice C — However,: signals contrast or qualification, implying the ratio would complicate or undercut the claim that the Comac is more aerodynamic, which it does not. ✗
  • Choice D — In conclusion,: signals a summary closing a broader discussion; with only two sentences in the passage, there is nothing substantial to conclude. ✗
That is the correct answer.
